name: ISharedModelState
summary: Represents the shared model state in Tekla Structures.

properties.name: Comment
properties.summary: Gets comment provided at setting state.

properties.name: IsLockOwner
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current user is the lock owner.

properties.name: LockOwner
properties.summary: Gets display name of the user who owns a lock (in case it is set).

properties.name: PendingVersionsCount
properties.summary: Gets number of pending versions or null when it is not relevant (for example model is not shared) or failed to get it.

properties.name: SetBy
properties.summary: Gets display name of the user who has set the state.

properties.name: State
properties.summary: Gets the state of the service.
